/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libqe_lax.a CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/distools.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/dspev_drv.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/la_error.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/la_helper.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/la_param.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/la_types.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/mp_diag.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/ptoolkit.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/rdiaghg.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/transto.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/zhpev_drv.f90.o CMakeFiles/qe_lax.dir/cdiaghg.f90.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libqe_lax.a
